label: Fixes
items: Soil sensor discovery now picks up the WH52 multi-parameter sensor's new Ecowitt category name (soil_moisture_ec_chN). Previous build only recognised soil_chN / ch_soilN / soilwetnessN.
The flattener also aliases the inner field names — if a firmware variant uses humidity / ec / conductivity instead of soilmoisture / soilcond, both shapes now work.
